faqs.question: What causes drain fly infestations in Midwood homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic matter that builds up inside drains, pipes, and sewage systems. In Midwood's older buildings, accumulated debris in aging plumbing creates ideal breeding conditions. Moisture from leaky pipes, standing water in basement drains, and infrequently used sinks or floor drains all contribute to drain fly problems.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Midwood?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Midwood properties take 1-2 hours depending on the number of affected drains and severity of infestation. Our technicians thoroughly treat all breeding sites, including floor drains, sink drains, shower drains, and any other affected areas. You should see significant reduction in drain fly activity within 2-3 days, with complete elimination within 1-2 weeks.

faqs.question: Why does the price range from $350 to $550?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on several factors including the size of your Midwood property, number of drains requiring treatment, severity of the infestation, and accessibility of breeding sites. A single-bathroom apartment will cost less than a multi-unit building or large home. We provide free inspections and upfront quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Are drain fly treatments safe for my Midwood home or business?
faqs.answer: Yes, our drain fly treatments are completely safe for residential and commercial properties in Midwood. We use EPA-approved products and bio-enzymatic cleaners that break down organic matter without harsh chemicals. Our methods are safe for families, pets, and food service establishments, with no need to vacate your property during or after treatment.
